task: Install pglite + run V7+V8 per Mr.Long 'cài pglite chạy V7-V8'

results.V8_soak_via_pglite: 6 fail (all ECONNRESET, pglite single-thread WASM constraint) / 1 self-test PASS (7 total)

bugs_found_and_fixed_during_pglite_run.subject: Schema FK ordering — ALTER players ADD COLUMN player_id was at BOTTOM of 003, but CREATE TABLE inventory at MIDDLE references it
bugs_found_and_fixed_during_pglite_run.fix: Moved ALTER + UNIQUE + gold ADD COLUMN to TOP of 003 file
bugs_found_and_fixed_during_pglite_run.why_not_caught_earlier: pg-mem unit tests bypass real 001 schema; DSN-gated integration was never actually run until pglite available

bugs_found_and_fixed_during_pglite_run.subject: Gap G1 seed used jsonb_build_object('delta', $::bigint) — PG silently rounds BIGINT to float64 past 2^53
bugs_found_and_fixed_during_pglite_run.fix: Seed now uses $::text — preserves precision; ad12_rollback already handles BigInt(string)

harness_improvements.subject: splitSqlStatements upgraded
harness_improvements.before: naive split on `;` broke on `;` inside SQL comments
harness_improvements.after: respects line comments, block comments, single-quoted strings, dollar-quoted blocks

harness_improvements.subject: single-pool pattern
harness_improvements.before: admin pool created schema then ended, scoped pool reconnected — pglite-socket emits ECONNRESET on reconnect

harness_improvements.subject: verify hook for search_path
harness_improvements.before: options: '-c search_path=...' startup param (pglite-socket doesn't handle)
harness_improvements.after: pg-pool verify(client, cb) hook — awaited per checkout, works on both PG and pglite

pglite_constraints_documented: Single-thread WASM — soak/concurrency tests with PARALLEL>1 will ECONNRESET
Gap C2 pglite-socket quirk on specific INSERT path — safe on real PG
For full V7+V8 coverage use real Postgres 16 in CI (GitHub Actions service container)
